content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (`App/LoginView.swift:6` SecureField) with a subscription paywall (`App/PaywallView.swift`), and demo credentials exist (`demo_user.txt`, `demo_password.txt`), but `notes.txt` contains only "n/a" with no instructions on how to reach the paywall/subscription flow or unlock premium features for review.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit guidance to navigate login-gated apps and locate paywalled features like app blocking/schedules/reports — a bare "n/a" note gives no such context and risks rejection under 2.1 even though credentials are technically provided. Fix by replacing notes.txt with steps: how to sign in, how to trigger the paywall, and whether the subscription is sandboxed/testable without real payment.
